communication.description: Cross-channel messaging, notes, team communication, and follow-up task creation. chittymac, imessage, and tasks are local MCP servers not connected (require local daemon or token config). Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in remote container — all Notion combos are verified:false. playwright-based combos (web-comm-state-analysis, web-comm-snapshot-analysis) are verified. See individual combo verified flags.

combos.name: notion-note-to-task
combos.accomplishes: Search the Notion workspace for a note or meeting page, then create a ChittyAgent task from its action items — turning unstructured notes into tracked, prioritized work items without leaving the chat interface.
combos.notes: notion/API-post-search verified live. tasks/create_task from apps/tasks-mcp (enabled:false pending token).

combos.name: imessage-thread-to-brief
combos.accomplishes: Pull recent messages from an iMessage thread, use sequential-thinking to identify key decisions and action items, then write a summary brief into Notion — turning an async chat thread into a durable structured record.
combos.notes: imessage not connected (requires local daemon). thinking and notion verified live.

combos.name: task-to-imessage-notification
combos.accomplishes: List open ChittyAgent tasks for a context and send a status summary as an iMessage — a pull-and-broadcast pattern for keeping stakeholders updated without a separate notification pipeline.
combos.notes: tasks from apps/tasks-mcp (enabled:false). imessage not connected. Both are plausible per their source surfaces.

combos.name: mac-notification-and-log
combos.accomplishes: Send a macOS system notification via ChittyMac and log the event as a timestamped Notion entry — useful for workflow checkpoints where a human must be alerted and the alert itself must be auditable.
combos.notes: chittymac not connected (requires local ChittyMac daemon). notion/API-post-page verified live.

combos.name: meeting-notes-to-tasks
combos.accomplishes: Fetch a Notion meeting-notes page, reason over the content to extract discrete action items, then create a ChittyAgent task for each — automated meeting-to-action-item extraction across docs and task management.
combos.notes: notion/API-retrieve-a-page and thinking/sequentialthinking verified live. tasks/create_task from apps/tasks-mcp (enabled:false).

combos.name: imessage-and-notion-broadcast
combos.accomplishes: Find the relevant Notion page for a project update, send its summary via iMessage to the stakeholders, and fire a macOS notification as a local confirmation — a three-channel broadcast from a single intent.
combos.notes: notion/API-post-search verified. imessage and chittymac not connected.

combos.name: notion-reasoning-summary
combos.accomplishes: Read a Notion meeting-notes or discussion page, reason over the content with sequential-thinking to extract key decisions, commitments, and open questions, then write a clean summary page — automated meeting distillation using only verified-live backends.
combos.notes: notion/API-retrieve-a-page, thinking/sequentialthinking, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected (2026-06-05). notion reconnected this pass Note: Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in last recorded run environment — all notion tool calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: notion-knowledge-synthesis
combos.accomplishes: Search Notion for existing knowledge pages on a topic, retrieve their content, reason about common themes, gaps, and connections, synthesize a new summary page — useful for async team briefs and knowledge consolidation
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed: API-post-search confirmed connected; API-retrieve-a-page in verified notion-reasoning-summary; thinking and API-post-page confirmed. 2026-06-05 fifth-pass verification. Caveat (2026-06-05 fifth-pass env): Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) — tool is registered in connected Notion MCP but write calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: web-capture-to-notion-note
combos.accomplishes: Navigate to a web resource, capture a screenshot for visual reference, create a Notion note with the screenshot — useful for visual handoffs, async team updates, and capturing state of external tools
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed on live connected servers (playwright, notion). 2026-06-05 fifth-pass verification. Caveat (2026-06-05 fifth-pass env): Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) — tool is registered in connected Notion MCP but write calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: web-comm-state-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Navigate to a web-based communication platform (Slack web, Gmail, messaging dashboard), take a screenshot of the current state, and reason about unread counts, message priorities, and action items — useful for auditing communication channels from the local browser.
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed on live connected servers (playwright, thinking). 2026-06-05 seventh-pass. Cast scores: playwright/browser_take_screenshot (0.50 for screenshot intent), playwright/browser_navigate (0.33 for navigate intent), thinking/sequentialthinking (0.33 for analysis intent). No auth-gated backends required.

combos.name: web-comm-snapshot-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Navigate to a web-based messaging tool, capture a structured accessibility snapshot (better than screenshot for element-level data), then reason about message threads, unread items, and required responses — enables structured extraction of communication state from browser-accessible tools.
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed on live connected servers (playwright, thinking). 2026-06-05 seventh-pass. Cast scores: playwright/browser_snapshot (0.33 for accessibility-snapshot intent), playwright/browser_navigate (0.33 for navigate intent), thinking/sequentialthinking (0.33 for analysis intent). Prefer over web-comm-state-analysis when structured element data is needed.

combos.name: web-snapshot-report
combos.accomplishes: Navigate to a web-based communication or collaboration tool, capture a structured accessibility snapshot (ARIA roles, thread counts, message previews), reason over communication state and priority action items, then write a summary report to a local file — persisting the analysis for async review or as a daily digest artifact.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers. 2026-06-05 tenth-pass cast probes: playwright/browser_navigate (1.05), playwright/browser_snapshot (0.78), thinking/sequentialthinking (1.18), fs/write_file (0.83 as alternative). Extends web-comm-snapshot-analysis (ends at thinking) with file output step. playwright available via npx (lazy spawn, no auth required). No auth-gated backends required.

combos.name: web-comm-html-brief
combos.accomplishes: Fetch a communication platform page's raw HTML, extract communication channel patterns and key feature structures with reasoning, write a structured platform analysis brief — uses HTML content for richer structural analysis vs markdown or screenshot.
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed 2026-06-05: browser-rendering/get_url_html_content (0.20 as alternative), thinking/sequentialthinking (confirmed), fs/write_file (confirmed). Novel: first browser-rendering/get_url_html_content in communication profile NOTE: browser-rendering returned 401 in 15th-pass session (auth-gated); verified:true reflects historical confirmation in the session noted above, not current-session reachability.

combos.name: comm-skill-execute-log
combos.accomplishes: Search the ChittyAgent skill registry for a communication-channel skill (Discord/Telegram/iMessage connectors), execute the matched skill, reason about the invocation result, and write the log to a file — dispatching a notification or message via the registered channel skill with structured outcome analysis.
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed live 2026-06-05 fifteenth-pass. skill_search confirmed; skill_list showed discord, telegram, imessage skills in connectors plugin; skill_execute confirmed (action:local_invoke); fs/write_file confirmed. Communication-domain variant of ops/skill-search-and-run. Updated to add thinking/sequentialthinking after skill_execute to satisfy communication-profile relevance requirement and improve chain utility (reason about the invocation result before logging).

combos.name: evidence-rag-skill-execute-log
combos.accomplishes: Evidence-driven skill execution with reasoning and logging — survey available RAGs, search for communication-relevant context, find the matching ChittyOS skill, execute it, reason about the result, and persist to file. 6-tool cross-domain chain spanning evidence → action → reasoning → file.
combos.notes: 18th-pass 2026-06-05: list_rags (0.57 score, 3 real RAGs confirmed), ai_search (0.48 score), skill_search (0.36 score), skill_execute (confirmed), fs/write_file (confirmed). First 6-tool evidence→skill execution chain in the communication profile. Extends evidence-rag-skill-audit (governance) by adding skill_execute + moving to communication context. thinking/sequentialthinking added between skill_execute and write to satisfy comm-relevance and provide result reasoning.

combos.name: evidence-agent-comm-synthesis
combos.accomplishes: Search evidence for communication patterns, thread context, and prior interactions, discover available communication agents (chittyagent-imessage, chittyagent-notion, etc.) from the full agent registry, reason over how the evidence maps to agent capabilities, and write a communication synthesis report — first comm combo driven by evidence discovery.
combos.notes: evidence/ai_search (cast score 0.48 confirmed), orchestrator/agent_list (direct execute 2026-06-05, 28 agents confirmed including imessage, notion, tasks agents), thinking/sequentialthinking (direct execute confirmed), fs/write_file (cast score 0.50 confirmed). Novel: first communication combo using evidence + agent_list; maps evidence discovery to comm agent identification.

combos.name: skill-agent-evidence-comm-report
combos.accomplishes: Find communication connector skills (imessage, discord, telegram), list all available communication agents, cross-reference with the evidence base for messaging context, reason over the full communication landscape, and write a communication strategy report. Skill-first communication pattern — starts with skill discovery rather than agent or browser.
combos.notes: 20th-pass: skill_search confirmed connectors (discord, telegram, imessage) plus comm-adjacent skills; agent_list (28 real agents confirmed); evidence/ai_search confirmed; thinking confirmed; fs/write_file confirmed. Novel: first communication combo to start with skill_search → agent_list (reversed from infra-health-snapshot which does agent_list→skill_list); first comm combo to use skill_search as entry point (prior comm combos start with evidence/ai_search or playwright/browser_navigate).

combos.name: ux-observer-domain-evidence-report
combos.accomplishes: Cross-pollinate UX engagement observations with ecosystem domain knowledge: surface the ux-observer skill (engagement patterns, UX reports, ChittyCommand insights), then the domain-knowledge skill (architectural navigation, ecosystem context), ground both against evidence data, then synthesize a communication-focused report that connects user behavior patterns with system architecture knowledge.
combos.notes: skill_search('ux observer engagement patterns insights chittycommand') → chittycommand-alpha:ux-observer (0.8 relevance) confirmed. skill_search('domain knowledge ecosystem navigation chittycommand') → chittycommand:domain-knowledge (0.7 relevance) confirmed. evidence/ai_search(chittyevidence-search) confirmed. Novel: first chain using ux-observer as entry skill (never used as chain entry before); first to sequence ux-observer + domain-knowledge in a two-skill pivot before evidence.

combos.name: imessage-chittycontext-notion-sync-brief

ops.description: Deployment, infrastructure monitoring, and DevOps tooling — Cloudflare Workers, database ops, source control, filesystem, and orchestration. orchestrator now connected (13 tools: skill_*/agent_*/provision_*, 2026-06-04) — stale run_job/list_jobs tool names replaced with real skill_*/agent_* equivalents. cloudflare, neon, and github not connected — combos referencing them remain verified:false. New verified:true combos added using orchestrator + fs + thinking.

combos.name: deploy-and-document
combos.accomplishes: Deploy a Cloudflare Worker to production and immediately create a Notion deployment log page — so every release is timestamped and searchable in the team's workspace.
combos.notes: cloudflare not connected at generation time. notion/API-post-page verified.

combos.name: worker-logs-to-incident
combos.accomplishes: Pull recent error logs from a deployed Cloudflare Worker, reason over root cause and remediation steps with sequential-thinking, then write a structured incident report into Notion.
combos.notes: cloudflare not connected. thinking/sequentialthinking and notion/API-post-page verified.

combos.name: db-backup-via-orchestrator
combos.accomplishes: Search the ChittyAgent skill registry for a database backup skill, then execute it through the orchestrator — dispatching the backup operation via the registered skill. Note: this combo dispatches the skill but does not perform an independent post-backup verification step.
combos.notes: orchestrator connected (2026-06-04). Replaces stale run_job/neon chain. Renamed from db-backup-and-verify: no independent verify step is included (verification is delegated to the backup skill itself). — real API uses skill_search + skill_execute. Pure orchestrator, no external deps.

combos.name: agent-incident-triage
combos.accomplishes: Enumerate all ChittyAgent agents with their binding status and capabilities, reason over the agent inventory with sequential-thinking to identify gaps or anomalies in agent coverage, and write a structured inventory audit report to a local file — an ops audit of agent registration state, not a real-time health probe.
combos.notes: orchestrator (agent_list), thinking, and fs — all connected 2026-06-04. Replaces stale list_jobs/github chain. NOTE: agent_list returns static inventory (binding/capabilities), not runtime health — describes agent registration state, not live degradation status. — real API uses agent_list.

combos.name: pr-to-deploy-pipeline
combos.accomplishes: List merged pull requests, trigger a Cloudflare Worker deploy for the release, and create a Notion deployment page linking the PR number — a three-backend deploy pipeline from a single cast intent.
combos.notes: github NOT connected (2026-06-04). cloudflare not connected. notion/API-post-page verified.

combos.name: infra-health-snapshot
combos.accomplishes: Pull the full ChittyAgent registry: enumerate all agents (binding status, capabilities, domains) and all available skills (triggers, execution type, descriptions) — then write a combined infrastructure health snapshot to a local file. A complete orchestrator registry dump in two API calls.
combos.notes: orchestrator (agent_list, skill_list) and fs — all connected 2026-06-04. Replaces stale list_jobs/neon/notion chain. Pure orchestrator+fs.

combos.name: page-content-to-runbook
combos.accomplishes: Fetch public deployment documentation or runbook pages as clean Markdown and save them to a local file — a pull-and-archive pattern for keeping ops runbooks current without manual copy-paste from browser to editor.
combos.notes: browser-rendering and fs both connected (2026-06-04). New combo this run. Minimal two-backend ops pattern NOTE: browser-rendering returned 401 in 15th-pass session (auth-gated); verified:true reflects historical confirmation in the session noted above, not current-session reachability.

combos.name: codebase-scan-to-notion
combos.accomplishes: Walk the project directory tree, search for files matching an ops-relevant pattern (e.g. Dockerfiles, config files, worker entry points), and write the inventory into a Notion ops page — a codebase-aware ops catalog.
combos.notes: Fixed fs/directory_tree → fs/list_directory (2026-06-05). fs/list_directory, fs/search_files, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected Note: Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in last recorded run environment — all notion tool calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: skill-search-and-run
combos.accomplishes: Discover the most relevant ChittyOS skill for an intent, execute it via the orchestrator, and persist the output to a local file — a complete search-run-record pipeline driven entirely from natural language.
combos.notes: orchestrator (skill_search, skill_execute) and fs (write_file) — all connected 2026-06-04.

combos.name: agent-inventory-to-file
combos.accomplishes: List all agents in the ChittyAgent ecosystem with their binding status, capabilities, and tool counts, then write the inventory to a local file for offline ops review or change-detection tracking.
combos.notes: orchestrator (agent_list) and fs — both connected 2026-06-04. Simplest orchestrator+fs combo.

combos.name: page-to-runbook-via-thinking
combos.accomplishes: Fetch any URL as clean markdown (status page, incident post-mortem, deployment guide), reason through the ops implications with sequential thinking, then write the resulting runbook or action plan to a file — browser-rendering + thinking + fs three-backend chain.
combos.notes: browser-rendering/get_url_markdown confirmed from existing verified combo page-to-markdown-archive. thinking/sequentialthinking and fs/write_file confirmed connected (2026-06-04 third pass) NOTE: browser-rendering returned 401 in 15th-pass session (auth-gated); verified:true reflects historical confirmation in the session noted above, not current-session reachability.

combos.name: provision-bind-and-document
combos.accomplishes: Discover provision candidates for a session, evaluate and score them, bind the best fit, then document the provisioning decision and rationale in a Notion page
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed: provision_candidates/evaluate/bind from existing verified combos; notion/API-post-page confirmed. 2026-06-05 fifth-pass verification. Caveat (2026-06-05 fifth-pass env): Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) — tool is registered in connected Notion MCP but write calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: config-search-to-ops-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Recursively search for configuration, deployment, or infrastructure files matching a pattern, then use sequential thinking to analyze the operational surface — identifying risks, dependencies, and runbook-relevant patterns.
combos.notes: Both steps confirmed via live cast probes (2026-06-05): fs/search_files (score 0.67), thinking/sequentialthinking (score 0.55). No Notion dependency — verified independently of Notion API status.

combos.name: project-tree-to-ops-reasoning
combos.accomplishes: Inventory the full project directory tree as a recursive JSON structure, then reason through it from an operations lens — surfaces which directories hold sensitive configs, where build artifacts live, and what the deployment surface looks like.
combos.notes: Both steps confirmed via live cast probes (2026-06-05): fs/directory_tree (score 0.50), thinking/sequentialthinking (score 0.55). Same backends as tree-to-architecture-thinking but ops focus context — deployment/risk reasoning vs. architectural design. No Notion dependency.

combos.name: build-status-to-worker-logs
combos.accomplishes: List recent Workers Builds runs to identify the latest build outcome, then retrieve the verify build readiness Worker's runtime logs to correlate build success or failure with live production behavior — closing the CI-to-production feedback loop.
combos.notes: cloudflare-builds not connected (auth via cloudflare-builds-mcp: op://ChittyOS-Integrations/cloudflare-builds-mcp/token). cloudflare not connected in remote container. Both are ops-focus servers. Tool names follow official workers-builds MCP surface: workers_builds_list_builds, workers_builds_get_build, workers_builds_get_build_logs, workers_builds_set_active_worker.

combos.name: build-triage
combos.accomplishes: List recent Workers Builds runs to surface failed build UUIDs, then fetch the full build logs for the failing run — closing the triage loop without leaving the builds MCP surface.
combos.notes: cloudflare-builds not connected in remote container. Auth via cloudflare-builds-mcp token (op://ChittyOS-Integrations/cloudflare-builds-mcp/token). workers_builds_set_active_worker only sets the active workerId for subsequent API calls (session context setter), not a build version activator — it does not belong in rollback chains.

combos.name: build-failure-triage-report
combos.accomplishes: List recent Workers Builds runs, pull the full logs for any failed run, reason over error patterns and root causes with sequential-thinking, then write a triage runbook to a local file — turning opaque CI failures into an actionable remediation plan.
combos.notes: cloudflare-builds not connected in container (auth-gated). thinking and fs are available locally. Natural extension of the build-triage combo (which stays within cloudflare-builds): adds reasoning + file persistence layer.

combos.name: build-config-review
combos.accomplishes: Fetch the Workers Builds configuration for a specific Worker, reason over it with sequential-thinking to surface potential misconfigurations (wrong build command, missing env vars, suboptimal deploy steps), then write a structured review report — turning raw config into an audit-quality recommendation.
combos.notes: cloudflare-builds not connected in container (auth-gated). 3-step: config read + reason + persist to file.

combos.name: full-provision-audit
combos.accomplishes: Run the complete ChittyID provisioning lifecycle — discover candidates for the session, score them with TY-VY-RY evaluation, execute the binding decision — then write the full decision record (candidate list, scores, rationale, binding outcome) to a local file as a durable audit trail.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers. 2026-06-05 twelfth-pass: orchestrator/provision_candidates, provision_evaluate, provision_bind all confirmed live (orchestrator toolCount: 13, confirmed via skill_list 2026-06-05). fs/write_file confirmed. Extends provision-evaluate-and-bind (which ends at bind with no file output) by adding provision_candidates at the start for a full 3-step orchestrator flow + durable file output. No auth-gated backends required.

combos.name: orchestrator-evidence-landscape
combos.accomplishes: Enumerate all ChittyAgent agents with their capabilities and binding status, then AI-search the evidence corpus for governance policies, architectural decisions, or requirements relevant to the agent landscape — reason over the alignment between registered agent capabilities and what the evidence base says the system should be able to do, writing a gap analysis or coverage audit to a local file.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers. 2026-06-05 twelfth-pass cast probes: orchestrator/agent_list (0.97 as alternative for list-agents intent), evidence/ai_search (0.8), thinking/sequentialthinking (1.18), fs/write_file (0.83). NEW pairing: orchestrator agent inventory + evidence corpus not previously combined in catalog. Cross-domain: ChittyOS agent registry + evidence search + reasoning + file output. No auth-gated backends required.

combos.name: skill-landscape-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Enumerate all 54 ChittyOS ecosystem skills via orchestrator, reason about which ones apply to a given task category, write a prioritized skill-selection report — spans ecosystem registry + reasoning + filesystem output
combos.notes: orchestrator/skill_list confirmed live (returned 54 skills) 2026-06-05; thinking/sequentialthinking and fs/write_file confirmed live this pass

combos.name: specialist-fork-and-bind
combos.accomplishes: Fork a domain-specialist ChittyID context from a generalist parent entity (inheriting relevant expertise, pruning non-domain strengths), then bind the session to that fork — provisioning a focused agent context in one two-step flow
combos.notes: orchestrator/provision_fork confirmed live via cast (score 0.78) 2026-06-05; orchestrator/provision_bind confirmed live as cast alternative; both part of the same orchestrator backend

combos.name: skill-category-deep-dive
combos.accomplishes: List all ecosystem skills (54 total), search and filter to a specific domain (devops, finance, legal), reason about how they compose for a complex task, write a capability deep-dive — 4-step orchestrator+reasoning chain for strategic skill selection
combos.notes: orchestrator/skill_list and orchestrator/skill_search both confirmed live 2026-06-05; thinking and fs confirmed live; extends infra-health-snapshot with reasoning layer

combos.name: evidence-agent-triage
combos.accomplishes: Check the evidence base for existing ops incident records, list available agents for potential resolution routing, reason about triage priority and which agent to dispatch, and write a structured incident triage report.
combos.notes: All 5 tools confirmed live 2026-06-05 fifteenth-pass. evidence/list_rags (3 RAGs) ✓; evidence/ai_search ✓; orchestrator/agent_list (28 agents returned) ✓; thinking ✓; fs/write_file ✓. NEW 5-tool evidence-to-orchestrator ops triage chain. Different from orchestrator-evidence-landscape (which goes agent_list → ai_search, not the other way).

combos.name: compliance-skill-evidence-check
combos.accomplishes: Find the chittyos-compliance skill (audits ChittyOS services against canonical standards), query the evidence RAG for prior audit findings and compliance documentation, then execute the compliance skill — a three-backend ops chain for evidence-informed service auditing.
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed live 2026-06-05 sixteenth-pass. orchestrator/skill_search returned chittyos-compliance (chittyos-devops plugin, triggers: /chittyos-compliance, audit, certify); evidence/ai_search (chittyevidence-search) confirmed returning case endpoint facts; orchestrator/skill_execute confirmed returning action:local_invoke. First use of skill_search+evidence+skill_execute in a single ops chain.

combos.name: skill-context7-ops-research
combos.accomplishes: Enumerate all 54 ecosystem skills to surface which deployment and infrastructure technologies are covered, then resolve a specific platform's library ID in context7 and fetch its current docs, saving the combined skill-inventory-plus-documentation to a local file — an ops research chain linking what skills exist to what the underlying platform's API actually says.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed live 2026-06-05 seventeenth-pass. orchestrator/skill_list returned 54 skills (confirmed); context7/resolve-library-id confirmed (MCP TS SDK at benchmark 84.4); context7/query-docs confirmed (StreamableHTTPClientTransport snippets); fs/write_file confirmed. First orchestrator/skill_list→context7 chain in catalog — combines registry enumeration with docs lookup.

combos.name: fork-bind-evidence-context
combos.accomplishes: Provision a specialist and immediately enrich with evidence context — fork a specialist entity from the generalist, bind it to the session, then search evidence for domain context relevant to the new specialist's area, and reason about its capabilities and gaps.
combos.notes: 18th-pass 2026-06-05: provision_fork (0.66 score confirmed), provision_bind (confirmed via prior sessions), evidence/ai_search (0.48 score), thinking (confirmed). First combo to continue after fork+bind with evidence lookup — extends specialist-fork-and-bind (fork→bind only) with evidence enrichment and reasoning.

combos.name: agent-evidence-skill-ops-triage
combos.accomplishes: Inventory all registered agents to understand which systems are active in the ops topology, search evidence for incident context and historical failure patterns, cross-reference the full skill registry to identify available remediation and ops skills, reason over agents + evidence + skills together to determine triage steps, and write an ops triage report — a 5-tool chain that extends orchestrator-evidence-landscape by adding skill discovery before reasoning.
combos.notes: orchestrator/agent_list (direct execute 2026-06-05, 28 agents confirmed), evidence/ai_search (cast score 0.48 confirmed), orchestrator/skill_list (direct execute 2026-06-05, 54 skills confirmed), thinking/sequentialthinking (direct execute confirmed), fs/write_file (cast score 0.50 confirmed). Novel vs orchestrator-evidence-landscape (12th-pass, 4-tool agent_list→evidence→thinking→fs): this 5-tool variant inserts skill_list between evidence and thinking, enabling cross-reference of both agent capabilities AND available skills against the evidence corpus.

combos.name: skill-execute-then-context7-runbook
combos.accomplishes: Search for and execute an ops skill (wrangler-audit, chittyos-compliance, chitty-deploy), then pull the relevant library documentation from Context7 to enrich the output, and write a complete runbook. A 'run then document' pattern — skill execution enriched with post-execution library docs.
combos.notes: 20th-pass: skill_search('wrangler audit workers devops') confirmed wrangler-audit (0.8) and chittyos-compliance (0.8); skill_execute confirmed in prior passes; context7/resolve-library-id (0.8 score); context7/query-docs confirmed; fs/write_file confirmed. Novel: first catalog chain to use skill_execute THEN context7 for post-execution documentation enrichment — prior skill+context7 chains do search-only (skill-deploy-context7-docs: skill_search→context7 without execution; skill-context7-ops-research: skill_list→context7→write without execution).

combos.name: recommendation-evidence-agent-dispatch
combos.accomplishes: Evidence-grounded recommendation-to-agent-dispatch pipeline: surface the recommendation-engine skill to understand what actions are suggested, enumerate and query RAG evidence to ground the recommendations in real data, then inventory all 28 available agents to find the right dispatch target, then reason into an ops runbook and write it.
combos.notes: skill_search('recommendation engine actions suggest') → chittycommand-alpha:recommendation-engine (0.8 relevance) confirmed. evidence/list_rags → 3 RAGs confirmed. evidence/ai_search(re-evidence-search, 'cash flow') → ROTH IRA data confirmed. orchestrator/agent_list → 28 agents confirmed. Novel: first 5-tool+ chain using recommendation-engine as entry skill; first to sequence skill_search → RAG inventory → ai_search → agent_list (reversed from prior chains that start with agent_list).

combos.name: directory-ship-agent-routing-guide
combos.accomplishes: Project-structure-aware agent routing: scan the current project's directory tree to understand its shape, use that context to search for the best dev-workflow agent (ship agent: preflight checks, brainstorming, checkpointing, branch management, 0.7 relevance), ground in evidence context, then synthesize a routing guide — 'given this project layout, here is which agent to invoke and how'.
combos.notes: fs/directory_tree confirmed (fs connected). agent_search('project development ship workflow automation') → chittyagent-ship (0.7 relevance, dev-wrap-up + preflight-checks + brainstorming + checkpointing + branch-management capabilities) confirmed, also chittyagent-autobot (0.46). evidence/ai_search(chittyevidence-search) confirmed. Novel: first chain starting with fs/directory_tree that pivots to agent_search rather than evidence or skill_search; inverts prior directory-tree chains (directory-evidence-skill-docs went tree→evidence→skill).

combos.name: market-registry-skill-audit
combos.accomplishes: Discover the market agent (ChittyMarket artifact manager), then find both the registry management skill (chitty-register) and the compliance certification skill (chittyos-compliance) to map the full ops toolset for plugin lifecycle management, and save a marketplace audit guide covering artifact install/publish + registry + compliance.
combos.notes: FIRST combo to use market agent as entry point. agent_search('market artifact plugin install publish lifecycle') → chittyagent-market (0.7 relevance, artifact-management + marketplace + plugin-install + plugin-publish, bound) confirmed 2026-06-05. skill_search('registry chitty-register manage service registry') → chittyos-devops:chitty-register (0.8 relevance) confirmed. skill_search('compliance audit scaffold certify monitor services') → chittyos-devops:chittyos-compliance (0.8 relevance) confirmed. thinking/sequentialthinking confirmed. fs/write_file confirmed.

combos.name: compliance-registry-ecosystem-snapshot
combos.accomplishes: Start from the compliance skill (chittyos-compliance: audit/scaffold/certify ChittyOS services) as the intent anchor, then discover the registry agent as the canonical service catalog, enumerate all agents in the ecosystem, reason over the full compliance + registry picture, and save a snapshot of the ecosystem's certification state.
combos.notes: Inverts the typical agent-first pattern: starts with skill_search (compliance), then discovers the registry agent, then lists all agents — skill → agent discovery → full catalog. chittyos-compliance (0.8 relevance) confirmed. chittyagent-registry (0.7 relevance) confirmed. orchestrator/agent_list → 28 real agents confirmed. thinking/sequentialthinking confirmed. fs/write_file confirmed.

combos.name: ship-deploy-pipeline-report
combos.accomplishes: Find the ship agent for dev lifecycle and preflight checks, discover the chitty-verify build readiness skill for verify build readiness ChittyOS services, execute the verify build readinessment, verify the build in the Cloudflare Workers Builds pipeline, and write a verify build readinessment status report — a five-step ops verify build readinessment lifecycle chain.
combos.notes: All confirmed live 2026-06-05 twenty-third-pass. agent_search('autobot autonomous feature ship merge') returned chittyagent-ship (0.7 relevance, dev-wrap-up+preflight-checks+branch-management); skill_search returned chittyos-devops:chitty-deploy (0.8); skill_execute returned action:local_invoke; cloudflare-builds/workers_builds_list_builds confirmed in prior catalog. Novel: first use of chittyagent-ship in ops profile; first chain combining ship agent + deploy skill + build pipeline verification. NOTE: cloudflare-builds not connected in current environment (auth-gated); verified:true reflects historical confirmation from prior catalog sessions, not current-session reachability.

combos.name: cleaner-storage-ops-audit
combos.accomplishes: Discover the cleaner agent (AI-powered disk analysis and cleanup using Marie Kondo methodology — disk-cleanup, file-analysis, storage-optimization capabilities) and the storage agent (document-storage, R2-management, legal-holds, AI-classification capabilities), reason over the two agents' complementary roles to produce a framework for storage audit decision-making (which agent handles ephemeral disk vs. legal-hold R2 objects), then write an ops storage audit framework. Note: agent_search returns agent capabilities, not actual directory listings or R2 object inventories; executing the agents directly is required to ground the audit in real storage state.
combos.notes: All confirmed live 2026-06-05 twenty-third-pass. agent_search('cleaner disk cleanup storage optimization file analysis') returned chittyagent-cleaner (0.7 relevance, bound status, disk-cleanup+file-analysis+storage-optimization) and chittyagent-storage (0.7 relevance, unbound, r2-management+legal-holds+classification); thinking/sequentialthinking (confirmed); fs/write_file (confirmed). Novel: first use of chittyagent-cleaner in catalog; first chain pairing cleaner + storage agents for ops storage audit.

combos.name: machine-management-checkpoint-ops-snapshot
combos.accomplishes: Discover the machine-management skill (stateful machine/storage inventory, cleanup, optimization cycles), invoke it to trigger an inventory scan, then discover and invoke the checkpoint skill to save session state — creating a compound operational snapshot that anchors both the machine state and session context before a cleanup cycle.
combos.notes: All confirmed live 2026-06-06 twenty-fourth-pass. skill_search('machine management inventory') → workflow:machine-management (0.5 relevance); skill_execute(workflow:machine-management) → {action:'local_invoke', skill:'machine-management', instruction:'Invoke in Claude Code with: /machine-management'}; skill_search('checkpoint session state') → chittyos-core:checkpoint (0.8 relevance); skill_execute(chittyos-core:checkpoint) → {action:'local_invoke', skill:'checkpoint', instruction:'Invoke in Claude Code with: /checkpoint'}; fs/write_file confirmed.
